title: 30''W x 60''L Blow Molded Plastic Folding Table
features: This 30''W x 60''L Commercial Grade Folding Table features a durable stain resistant blow molded top and sturdy frame.
The low maintenance blow molded top cleans easily.
This 5 ft. table locks in place in a SNAP with the leg locking system for easy set-ups.
This table can be used as a temporary seating solution or set-up in a permanent location for everyday use.

specifications.Free Shipping Deal Type: Free Shipping on Tables and Chairs Over $5k, Free Shipping on 10 or more
